mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCECCF ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , FORM_NUM , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , FORM_TYPE , CONT_TYPE , CONT_DIV , FORM_NM , BUNDLE_FLAG , AUTO_RENEW_FLAG , NH_COMM_FLAG , RMK , FORM_TEXT_NUM , FORM_TEXT , SUB_FORM_DIV , ATT_FILE_NUM , USE_FLAG , ECONT_FLAG , APPROVAL_FLAG , SIGN_STATUS ) SELECT GATE_CD , #{BUYER_CD} , #{NEW_FORM_NUM} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , '0' , FORM_TYPE , CONT_TYPE , CONT_DIV , '[Copied] ' FORM_NM , BUNDLE_FLAG , AUTO_RENEW_FLAG , NH_COMM_FLAG , RMK , #{NEW_FORM_TEXT_NUM} , FORM_TEXT , SUB_FORM_DIV , ATT_FILE_NUM , '1' , ECONT_FLAG , APPROVAL_FLAG , 'T' FROM STOCECCF WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND FORM_NUM = #{FORM_NUM}

INSERT INTO STOCECCR ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , FORM_NUM , REL_FORM_NUM , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , REL_FORM_SQ , REQUIRE_FLAG ) SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , #{NEW_FORM_NUM} , REL_FORM_NUM , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , DEL_FLAG ,(CASE WHEN REL_FORM_SQ IS NULL THEN ELSE REL_FORM_SQ END) , REQUIRE_FLAG FROM STOCECCR WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND FORM_NUM = #{FORM_NUM}
mapper.select: SELECT RELAT_YN FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CUST_CD = #{BUYER_CD}
